title: Excalibur | Ribbits Support
description: Resource pack to support the fantastic Ribbits mod by joosh_7889 Combining the color palette and aesthetics of the medieval Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew
body:
Resource pack to support the fantastic [ Ribbits mod by joosh_7889](https://modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) Combining the color palette and aesthetics of the medieval [Excalibur resource pack by Maffhew](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal)

![ribbits1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95527d2bfd6400493fd02289243d4ccff29d93a4_0.webp)

All models and textures have been modified, with some minor changes, such as the color palettes only, and other major changes such as redesigning the models of some assets

Supported versions: 1.20.1 (current with the mod)

![ribbits2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/840794f9cfbda515536e775a2c92113c4be904a9_0.webp)

Credits:

joosh_7889 - Ribbits mod 

Maffhew - Excalibur resource pack
